USERMESSAGE #44
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→/**
     2→ * Engine.js — SimulationEngine: manages characters, object state machines, and
     3→ * default random-wander behaviour (with 30% chance of object interaction).
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { ObjectEngine, OBJECT_DEFS } from './objects.js';
     7→
     8→export class SimulationEngine {
     9→  /**
    10→   * @param {object}      config
    11→   * @param {boolean[][]} config.walkable   - walkable[row][col]
    12→   * @param {number}      config.gridCols
    13→   * @param {number}      config.gridRows
    14→   * @param {object}      [config.aiEngine] - AIEngine instance (optional)
    15→   */
    16→  constructor(config = {}) {
    17→    this.walkable  = config.walkable  || [];
    18→    this.gridCols  = config.gridCols  || 19;
    19→    this.gridRows  = config.gridRows  || 13;
    20→    this.aiEngine  = config.aiEngine  || null;
    21→
    22→    this.characters = [];
    23→
    24→    // Object state machine engine — pre-loaded with Japanese Home objects
    25→    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();
    26→    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);
    27→
    28→    // Events queued for scene to consume (emoji floats, etc.)
    29→    this.pendingEvents = [];
    30→
    31→    // Sim clock — starts at 08:00 AM game-time
    32→    this.simTimeMs = 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
    33→    // 1 real second = 60 sim seconds  (1 real min = 1 sim hour)
    34→    this.simSpeed  = 60;
    35→
    36→    // Cache walkable tiles list (built lazily)
    37→    this._walkableTiles = null;
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  addCharacter(char) {
    41→    this.characters.push(char);
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  // ── Main update loop ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    45→
    46→  update(deltaMs) {
    47→    // Advance sim clock
    48→    this.simTimeMs += deltaMs * this.simSpeed;
    49→
    50→    // Optional AI decisions — pass live object list so AI sees current states
    51→    if (this.aiEngine) {
    52→      this.aiEngine.update(deltaMs, this.characters, this.objectEngine.getAll(), {
    53→        timeString: this.getSimTimeString(),
    54→        findAdjacentWalkable: this._findAdjacentWalkable.bind(this),
    55→        buildDynamicWalkable: (char) => this._buildDynamicWalkable(char),
    56→        pushEvent: (ev) => this.pendingEvents.push(ev),
    57→      });
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    // Tick object state machines; collect auto-transition events
    61→    const objEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(deltaMs);
    62→    for (const ev of objEvents) {
    63→      if (ev.emoji) this.pendingEvents.push(ev);
    64→    }
    65→
    66→    for (const char of this.characters) {
    67→      // Defensive release: if interactTarget is set but the character is no longer
    68→      // interacting, an external change (e.g. a stale async AI decision resolving
    69→      // between frames) moved them out of 'interacting' without triggering the
    70→      // normal detection below.  Release the slot now so the object doesn't stay
    71→      // permanently full.
    72→      if (char.interactTarget && char.action !== 'interacting') {
    73→        console.warn(
    74→          `[Engine] defensive release: ${char.name} has interactTarget ` +
    75→          `'${char.interactTarget}' but action='${char.action}' — releasing slot`
    76→        );
    77→        this.objectEngine.release(char.interactTarget, char.name);
    78→        char.interactTarget = null;
    79→      }
    80→
    81→      // Save pre-update state to detect interaction-end transitions
    82→      const prevAction         = char.action;
    83→      const prevInteractTarget = char.interactTarget;
    84→
    85→      // Handle arrival: character reached target object tile
    86→      if (char.action === 'idle' && char.targetObjectId) {
    87→        this._handleObjectArrival(char);
    88→      }
    89→
    90→      // Handle arrival: character reached talk target
    91→      if (char.action === 'idle' && char.pendingTalkTarget) {
    92→        this._handleTalkArrival(char);
    93→      }
    94→
    95→      // Mid-walk: periodically re-route toward a moving talk target
    96→      if (char.action === 'walking' && char.pendingTalkTarget) {
    97→        char._talkRetargetTimer -= deltaMs;
    98→        if (char._talkRetargetTimer <= 0) {
    99→          char._talkRetargetTimer = 2000; // re-check every 2 s
   100→          this._updateTalkRoute(char);
   101→        }
   102→      }
   103→
   104→      // Trigger random wander (or object visit) when idle and timer expired
   105→      if (char.action === 'idle' && char.wanderTimer <= 0) {
   106→        this._doWander(char);
   107→      }
   108→
   109→      // Tick speech timer — fire a random line when it expires
   110→      if (char.dialogue.length > 0 && char.pendingSpeech === null) {
   111→        char.speechTimer -= deltaMs;
   112→        if (char.speechTimer <= 0) {
   113→          const idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * char.dialogue.length);
   114→          char.pendingSpeech = char.dialogue[idx];
   115→          char.speechTimer   = 20000 + Math.random() * 20000; // reset 20–40 s
   116→        }
   117→      }
   118→
   119→      // Per-character update (movement, animations, sprite sync)
   120→      char.update(deltaMs);
   121→
   122→      // Detect interaction end: release slot so other characters can use the object
   123→      if (prevAction === 'interacting' && char.action !== 'interacting' && prevInteractTarget) {
   124→        this.objectEngine.release(prevInteractTarget, char.name);
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  // ── Object interaction ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   130→
   131→  /**
   132→   * Called when a character arrives at an object's adjacent tile.
   133→   * Fires the 'use' transition and puts the character into 'interacting' state.
   134→   * If the object has no valid transition, finds an alternative instead of idling.
   135→   */
   136→  _handleObjectArrival(char) {
   137→    const objectId = char.targetObjectId;
   138→    const action   = char.pendingAction || 'use';
   139→
   140→    // Clear targeting immediately so we don't re-fire on the next idle frame.
   141→    // _fallbackToAlternativeObject may set a new targetObjectId if it finds one.
   142→    char.targetObjectId = null;
   143→    char.pendingAction  = null;
   144→
   145→    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);
   146→
   147→    if (event) {
   148→      // Convert reservation → active occupancy
   149→      this.objectEngine.arrive(objectId, char.name);
   150→
   151→      const obj = this.objectEngine.getById(objectId);
   152→
   153→      // Hold the character for the full auto_next duration if the new state has one;
   154→      // otherwise fall back to the object's generic interactMs.
   155→      let holdMs = obj ? obj.interactMs : 8000;
   156→      if (obj && event.state) {
   157→        const stateDef = obj.states[event.state];
   158→        if (stateDef?.auto_next?.after) {
   159→          holdMs = stateDef.auto_next.after * 1000;
   160→        }
   161→      }
   162→
   163→      // Face toward the object tile before entering interaction
   164→      if (obj) {
   165→        const dx = obj.tx - Math.round(char.tx);
   166→        const dy = obj.ty - Math.round(char.ty);
   167→        if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {
   168→          char.facing = dx >= 0 ? 'right' : 'left';
   169→        } else {
   170→          char.facing = dy >= 0 ? 'down' : 'up';
   171→        }
   172→      }
   173→
   174→      char.startInteraction(objectId, holdMs, obj?.interactAnim ?? null);
   175→
   176→      if (event.speech) char.pendingSpeech = event.speech;
   177→      if (event.emoji)  this.pendingEvents.push(event);
   178→    } else {
   179→      // No valid transition (object changed state mid-walk) — release the
   180→      // reservation and try to find an alternative object.
   181→      this.objectEngine.release(objectId, char.name);
   182→      this._fallbackToAlternativeObject(char, objectId);
   183→    }
   184→  }
   185→
   186→  // ── Talk handshake ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   187→
   188→  /**
   189→   * Called when a character arrives at the tile adjacent to their talk target.
   190→   * Checks proximity and re-evaluates B's availability before starting conversation.
   191→   */
   192→  _handleTalkArrival(char) {
   193→    const target = char.pendingTalkTarget;
   194→    char.pendingTalkTarget = null;
   195→
   196→    // Proximity check: target may have moved significantly during the walk.
   197→    const dx   = Math.round(target.tx) - Math.round(char.tx);
   198→    const dy   = Math.round(target.ty) - Math.round(char.ty);
   199→    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
   200→
   201→    if (dist > 3) {
   202→      // Target has drifted — try to follow if not too far
   203→      if (dist <= 10) {
   204→        const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);
   205→        const adjTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(Math.round(target.tx), Math.round(target.ty), dynWalkable);
   206→        if (adjTile && char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty, dynWalkable)) {
   207→          // Re-attach pending talk so we retry on next arrival
   208→          char.pendingTalkTarget   = target;
   209→          char._talkRetargetTimer  = 2000;
   210→          return;
   211→        }
   212→      }
   213→      // Too far or unreachable — abort
   214→      this.pendingEvents.push({
   215→        type:      'fallback',
   216→        charLabel: char.label,
   217→        reason:    'talk_target_moved',
   218→        fromLabel: target.label,
   219→        toLabel:   null,
   220→      });
   221→      char.pendingTalkDialogue = null;
   222→      char.pendingTalkResponse = null;
   223→      char.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;
   224→      return;
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    // Re-check availability: accept if idle or walking, reject if busy
   228→    const canTalk = target.action === 'idle' || target.action === 'walking';
   229→
   230→    if (!canTalk) {
   231→      this.pendingEvents.push({
   232→        type:           'talk_rejected',
   233→        initiatorLabel: char.label,
   234→        targetLabel:    target.label,
   235→      });
   236→      char.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;
   237→      return;
   238→    }
   239→
   240→    this._startConversation(char, target);
   241→  }
   242→
   243→  /**
   244→   * Configurable conversation duration range (ms).
   245→   * Defaults to 10–15 s; override via constructor config.
   246→   */
   247→  get _talkDurationMs() {
   248→    return 10_000 + Math.random() * 5_000;
   249→  }
   250→
   251→  /**
   252→   * Synchronise charA and charB into a shared 'talking' state.
   253→   * Both face each other, AI timers are paused (via action check in AIEngine),
   254→   * and conversation ends naturally when the timer expires.
   255→   */
   256→  _startConversation(charA, charB) {
   257→    // Release any pending object reservation charB held while walking.
   258→    // startTalk() clears targetObjectId without calling objectEngine.release(),
   259→    // so we must do it here before the slot becomes permanently orphaned.
   260→    if (charB.targetObjectId) {
   261→      this.objectEngine.release(charB.targetObjectId, charB.name);
   262→      charB.targetObjectId = null;
   263→      charB.pendingAction  = null;
   264→    }
   265→
   266→    const duration = this._talkDurationMs;
   267→
   268→    // Face each other
   269→    const dx = Math.round(charB.tx) - Math.round(charA.tx);
   270→    const dy = Math.round(charB.ty) - Math.round(charA.ty);
   271→    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {
   272→      charA.facing = dx >= 0 ? 'right' : 'left';
   273→      charB.facing = dx >= 0 ? 'left'  : 'right';
   274→    } else {
   275→      charA.facing = dy >= 0 ? 'down' : 'up';
   276→      charB.facing = dy >= 0 ? 'up'   : 'down';
   277→    }
   278→
   279→    // Transfer queued dialogue to speech bubbles
   280→    if (charA.pendingTalkDialogue) {
   281→      charA.pendingSpeech          = charA.pendingTalkDialogue;
   282→      charA.pendingTalkDialogue    = null;
   283→    }
   284→    if (charA.pendingTalkResponse) {
   285→      charB.pendingSpeech          = charA.pendingTalkResponse;
   286→      charA.pendingTalkResponse    = null;
   287→    }
   288→
   289→    charA.startTalk(charB, duration);
   290→    charB.startTalk(charA, duration);
   291→
   292→    this.pendingEvents.push({
   293→      type:           'conversation_start',
   294→      initiatorLabel: charA.label,
   295→      targetLabel:    charB.label,
   296→    });
   297→  }
   298→
   299→  // ── Wander ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   300→
   301→  _doWander(char) {
   302→    // Build a walkable grid that treats other characters' tiles as obstacles
   303→    const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);
   304→
   305→    // 30% chance: walk to a random interactive object instead of wandering freely
   306→    if (Math.random() < 0.3) {
   307→      const objects = this.objectEngine.getAll();
   308→      if (objects.length > 0) {
   309→        // Shuffle and try each until one has an available slot and a reachable adjacent tile
   310→        const shuffled = objects.slice().sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
   311→        for (const obj of shuffled) {
   312→          if (obj.isFull()) continue; // skip objects at capacity
   313→          // Only target objects whose current state accepts a 'use' interaction
   314→          const stateDef = obj.states[obj.state];
   315→          if (!stateDef?.transitions?.use) continue;
   316→          const tile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(obj.tx, obj.ty, dynWalkable);
   317→          if (tile && char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty, dynWalkable)) {
   318→            obj.reserve(char.name); // claim a slot before walking
   319→            char.targetObjectId = obj.id;
   320→            char.pendingAction  = 'use';
   321→            return;
   322→          }
   323→        }
   324→        // All objects full/non-interactable/unreachable — fall through to random wander
   325→      }
   326→    }
   327→
   328→    // Random walkable tile
   329→    const tiles = this._getWalkableTiles();
   330→    if (tiles.length === 0) {
   331→      char.wanderTimer = 2000;
   332→      return;
   333→    }
   334→
   335→    const cx = Math.round(char.tx);
   336→    const cy = Math.round(char.ty);
   337→
   338→    let moved = false;
   339→    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 15; attempt++) {
   340→      const tile = tiles[Math.floor(Math.random() * tiles.length)];
   341→      if (tile.tx === cx && tile.ty === cy) continue;
   342→      moved = char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty, dynWalkable);
   343→      if (moved) break;
   344→    }
   345→
   346→    if (!moved) {
   347→      char._failedMoveCount++;
   348→      if (char._failedMoveCount >= 3) {
   349→        // Deadlock escape: step onto any free adjacent tile to break the standstill
   350→        char._failedMoveCount = 0;
   351→        const escapeTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(cx, cy, dynWalkable);
   352→        if (escapeTile) char.moveTo(escapeTile.tx, escapeTile.ty, dynWalkable);
   353→      }
   354→      // Retry quickly — the blocking character will likely have moved by then
   355→      char.wanderTimer = 500 + Math.random() * 500;
   356→    }
   357→  }
   358→
   359→  // ── Fallback helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   360→
   361→  /**
   362→   * Find the closest available object that `char` can interact with right now,
   363→   * excluding the object with `excludeId`.
   364→   * @returns {ObjectInstance|null}
   365→   */
   366→  _findAlternativeObject(char, excludeId) {
   367→    const objects = this.objectEngine.getAll();
   368→    let best     = null;
   369→    let bestDist = Infinity;
   370→
   371→    for (const obj of objects) {
   372→      if (obj.id === excludeId) continue;
   373→      if (obj.isFull()) continue;
   374→      // Require a usable state right now
   375→      const stateDef = obj.states[obj.state];
   376→      if (!stateDef?.transitions?.use) continue;
   377→      // Require a reachable adjacent tile
   378→      if (!this._findAdjacentWalkable(obj.tx, obj.ty)) continue;
   379→
   380→      const dx   = obj.tx - Math.round(char.tx);
   381→      const dy   = obj.ty - Math.round(char.ty);
   382→      const dist = dx * dx + dy * dy;
   383→      if (dist < bestDist) { bestDist = dist; best = obj; }
   384→    }
   385→
   386→    return best;
   387→  }
   388→
   389→  /**
   390→   * Called when a character's object interaction fails on arrival.
   391→   * Tries to redirect to the nearest available alternative; emits a 'fallback' event.
   392→   */
   393→  _fallbackToAlternativeObject(char, fromId) {
   394→    const fromObj     = this.objectEngine.getById(fromId);
   395→    const alternative = this._findAlternativeObject(char, fromId);
   396→
   397→    if (alternative) {
   398→      const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);
   399→      const adjTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(alternative.tx, alternative.ty, dynWalkable);
   400→      if (adjTile && char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty, dynWalkable)) {
   401→        alternative.reserve(char.name);
   402→        char.targetObjectId = alternative.id;
   403→        char.pendingAction  = 'use';
   404→
   405→        this.pendingEvents.push({
   406→          type:      'fallback',
   407→          charLabel: char.label,
   408→          reason:    'object_unavailable',
   409→          fromLabel: fromObj?.name ?? fromId,
   410→          toLabel:   alternative.name,
   411→        });
   412→        return;
   413→      }
   414→    }
   415→
   416→    // No usable alternative — idle
   417→    char.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;
   418→    this.pendingEvents.push({
   419→      type:      'fallback',
   420→      charLabel: char.label,
   421→      reason:    'object_unavailable',
   422→      fromLabel: fromObj?.name ?? fromId,
   423→      toLabel:   null,
   424→    });
   425→  }
   426→
   427→  /**
   428→   * Called periodically while a character is walking toward a talk target.
   429→   * Re-routes the character if the target has moved, or aborts if too far.
   430→   */
   431→  _updateTalkRoute(char) {
   432→    const target = char.pendingTalkTarget;
   433→    if (!target) return;
   434→
   435→    const dx   = Math.round(target.tx) - Math.round(char.tx);
   436→    const dy   = Math.round(target.ty) - Math.round(char.ty);
   437→    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
   438→
   439→    // If target has wandered more than 10 tiles away, give up
   440→    if (dist > 10) {
   441→      char.pendingTalkTarget   = null;
   442→      char.pendingTalkDialogue = null;
   443→      char.pendingTalkResponse = null;
   444→      char.path                = [];
   445→      char.action              = 'idle';
   446→      char.wanderTimer         = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;
   447→
   448→      this.pendingEvents.push({
   449→        type:      'fallback',
   450→        charLabel: char.label,
   451→        reason:    'talk_target_moved',
   452→        fromLabel: target.label,
   453→        toLabel:   null,
   454→      });
   455→      return;
   456→    }
   457→
   458→    // Re-route only if the path end has drifted more than 1 tile from target
   459→    const pathEnd = char.path[char.path.length - 1];
   460→    if (pathEnd) {
   461→      const edx = pathEnd.tx - Math.round(target.tx);
   462→      const edy = pathEnd.ty - Math.round(target.ty);
   463→      if (Math.sqrt(edx * edx + edy * edy) > 1) {
   464→        const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);
   465→        const adjTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(Math.round(target.tx), Math.round(target.ty), dynWalkable);
   466→        if (adjTile) char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty, dynWalkable);
   467→      }
   468→    }
   469→  }
   470→
   471→  /**
   472→   * Return the first walkable tile cardinally adjacent to (tx, ty), or null.
   473→   * @param {boolean[][]} [walkable] - grid to check; defaults to the static this.walkable
   474→   */
   475→  _findAdjacentWalkable(tx, ty, walkable = this.walkable) {
   476→    const dirs = [
   477→      { tx, ty: ty - 1 },
   478→      { tx, ty: ty + 1 },
   479→      { tx: tx - 1, ty },
   480→      { tx: tx + 1, ty },
   481→    ];
   482→    for (const d of dirs) {
   483→      if (d.tx >= 0 && d.tx < this.gridCols && d.ty >= 0 && d.ty < this.gridRows) {
   484→        if (walkable[d.ty]?.[d.tx]) return d;
   485→      }
   486→    }
   487→    return null;
   488→  }
   489→
   490→  /**
   491→   * Clone the static walkable grid and mark every other character's current tile
   492→   * as blocked.  The calling character's own tile is left walkable.
   493→   * @param {object} excludeChar - the character doing the pathfinding (not blocked)
   494→   * @returns {boolean[][]}
   495→   */
   496→  _buildDynamicWalkable(excludeChar) {
   497→    const dynamic = this.walkable.map(row => row.slice());
   498→    for (const char of this.characters) {
   499→      if (char === excludeChar) continue;
   500→      const cx = Math.round(char.tx);
   501→      const cy = Math.round(char.ty);
   502→      if (cy >= 0 && cy < this.gridRows && cx >= 0 && cx < this.gridCols) {
   503→        dynamic[cy][cx] = false;
   504→      }
   505→    }
   506→    return dynamic;
   507→  }
   508→
   509→  _getWalkableTiles() {
   510→    if (this._walkableTiles) return this._walkableTiles;
   511→    const tiles = [];
   512→    for (let row = 0; row < this.gridRows; row++) {
   513→      for (let col = 0; col < this.gridCols; col++) {
   514→        if (this.walkable[row]?.[col]) tiles.push({ tx: col, ty: row });
   515→      }
   516→    }
   517→    this._walkableTiles = tiles;
   518→    return tiles;
   519→  }
   520→
   521→  // ── Sim clock ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   522→
   523→  getSimTimeString() {
   524→    const totalSec = Math.floor(this.simTimeMs / 1000);
   525→    const hours    = Math.floor(totalSec / 3600) % 24;
   526→    const minutes  = Math.floor((totalSec % 3600) / 60);
   527→    const ampm     = hours >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
   528→    const h        = hours % 12 || 12;
   529→    return `${h}:${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')} ${ampm}`;
   530→  }
   531→}
   532→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01KaLrBMcdFaH9pPyrxnX3A2",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192/**\n     2\u2192 * Engine.js \u2014 SimulationEngine: manages characters, object state machines, and\n     3\u2192 * default random-wander behaviour (with 30% chance of object interaction).\n     4\u2192 */\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { ObjectEngine, OBJECT_DEFS } from './objects.js';\n     7\u2192\n     8\u2192export class SimulationEngine {\n     9\u2192  /**\n    10\u2192   * @param {object}      config\n    11\u2192   * @param {boolean[][]} config.walkable   - walkable[row][col]\n    12\u2192   * @param {number}      config.gridCols\n    13\u2192   * @param {number}      config.gridRows\n    14\u2192   * @param {object}      [config.aiEngine] - AIEngine instance (optional)\n    15\u2192   */\n    16\u2192  constructor(config = {}) {\n    17\u2192    this.walkable  = config.walkable  || [];\n    18\u2192    this.gridCols  = config.gridCols  || 19;\n    19\u2192    this.gridRows  = config.gridRows  || 13;\n    20\u2192    this.aiEngine  = config.aiEngine  || null;\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192    this.characters = [];\n    23\u2192\n    24\u2192    // Object state machine engine \u2014 pre-loaded with Japanese Home objects\n    25\u2192    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();\n    26\u2192    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192    // Events queued for scene to consume (emoji floats, etc.)\n    29\u2192    this.pendingEvents = [];\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192    // Sim clock \u2014 starts at 08:00 AM game-time\n    32\u2192    this.simTimeMs = 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000;\n    33\u2192    // 1 real second = 60 sim seconds  (1 real min = 1 sim hour)\n    34\u2192    this.simSpeed  = 60;\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192    // Cache walkable tiles list (built lazily)\n    37\u2192    this._walkableTiles = null;\n    38\u2192  }\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192  addCharacter(char) {\n    41\u2192    this.characters.push(char);\n    42\u2192  }\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Main update loop \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192  update(deltaMs) {\n    47\u2192    // Advance sim clock\n    48\u2192    this.simTimeMs += deltaMs * this.simSpeed;\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    // Optional AI decisions \u2014 pass live object list so AI sees current states\n    51\u2192    if (this.aiEngine) {\n    52\u2192      this.aiEngine.update(deltaMs, this.characters, this.objectEngine.getAll(), {\n    53\u2192        timeString: this.getSimTimeString(),\n    54\u2192        findAdjacentWalkable: this._findAdjacentWalkable.bind(this),\n    55\u2192        buildDynamicWalkable: (char) => this._buildDynamicWalkable(char),\n    56\u2192        pushEvent: (ev) => this.pendingEvents.push(ev),\n    57\u2192      });\n    58\u2192    }\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192    // Tick object state machines; collect auto-transition events\n    61\u2192    const objEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(deltaMs);\n    62\u2192    for (const ev of objEvents) {\n    63\u2192      if (ev.emoji) this.pendingEvents.push(ev);\n    64\u2192    }\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n    67\u2192      // Defensive release: if interactTarget is set but the character is no longer\n    68\u2192      // interacting, an external change (e.g. a stale async AI decision resolving\n    69\u2192      // between frames) moved them out of 'interacting' without triggering the\n    70\u2192      // normal detection below.  Release the slot now so the object doesn't stay\n    71\u2192      // permanently full.\n    72\u2192      if (char.interactTarget && char.action !== 'interacting') {\n    73\u2192        console.warn(\n    74\u2192          `[Engine] defensive release: ${char.name} has interactTarget ` +\n    75\u2192          `'${char.interactTarget}' but action='${char.action}' \u2014 releasing slot`\n    76\u2192        );\n    77\u2192        this.objectEngine.release(char.interactTarget, char.name);\n    78\u2192        char.interactTarget = null;\n    79\u2192      }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192      // Save pre-update state to detect interaction-end transitions\n    82\u2192      const prevAction         = char.action;\n    83\u2192      const prevInteractTarget = char.interactTarget;\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192      // Handle arrival: character reached target object tile\n    86\u2192      if (char.action === 'idle' && char.targetObjectId) {\n    87\u2192        this._handleObjectArrival(char);\n    88\u2192      }\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192      // Handle arrival: character reached talk target\n    91\u2192      if (char.action === 'idle' && char.pendingTalkTarget) {\n    92\u2192        this._handleTalkArrival(char);\n    93\u2192      }\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192      // Mid-walk: periodically re-route toward a moving talk target\n    96\u2192      if (char.action === 'walking' && char.pendingTalkTarget) {\n    97\u2192        char._talkRetargetTimer -= deltaMs;\n    98\u2192        if (char._talkRetargetTimer <= 0) {\n    99\u2192          char._talkRetargetTimer = 2000; // re-check every 2 s\n   100\u2192          this._updateTalkRoute(char);\n   101\u2192        }\n   102\u2192      }\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192      // Trigger random wander (or object visit) when idle and timer expired\n   105\u2192      if (char.action === 'idle' && char.wanderTimer <= 0) {\n   106\u2192        this._doWander(char);\n   107\u2192      }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192      // Tick speech timer \u2014 fire a random line when it expires\n   110\u2192      if (char.dialogue.length > 0 && char.pendingSpeech === null) {\n   111\u2192        char.speechTimer -= deltaMs;\n   112\u2192        if (char.speechTimer <= 0) {\n   113\u2192          const idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * char.dialogue.length);\n   114\u2192          char.pendingSpeech = char.dialogue[idx];\n   115\u2192          char.speechTimer   = 20000 + Math.random() * 20000; // reset 20\u201340 s\n   116\u2192        }\n   117\u2192      }\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192      // Per-character update (movement, animations, sprite sync)\n   120\u2192      char.update(deltaMs);\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192      // Detect interaction end: release slot so other characters can use the object\n   123\u2192      if (prevAction === 'interacting' && char.action !== 'interacting' && prevInteractTarget) {\n   124\u2192        this.objectEngine.release(prevInteractTarget, char.name);\n   125\u2192      }\n   126\u2192    }\n   127\u2192  }\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Object interaction \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192  /**\n   132\u2192   * Called when a character arrives at an object's adjacent tile.\n   133\u2192   * Fires the 'use' transition and puts the character into 'interacting' state.\n   134\u2192   * If the object has no valid transition, finds an alternative instead of idling.\n   135\u2192   */\n   136\u2192  _handleObjectArrival(char) {\n   137\u2192    const objectId = char.targetObjectId;\n   138\u2192    const action   = char.pendingAction || 'use';\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192    // Clear targeting immediately so we don't re-fire on the next idle frame.\n   141\u2192    // _fallbackToAlternativeObject may set a new targetObjectId if it finds one.\n   142\u2192    char.targetObjectId = null;\n   143\u2192    char.pendingAction  = null;\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);\n   146\u2192\n   147\u2192    if (event) {\n   148\u2192      // Convert reservation \u2192 active occupancy\n   149\u2192      this.objectEngine.arrive(objectId, char.name);\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192      const obj = this.objectEngine.getById(objectId);\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192      // Hold the character for the full auto_next duration if the new state has one;\n   154\u2192      // otherwise fall back to the object's generic interactMs.\n   155\u2192      let holdMs = obj ? obj.interactMs : 8000;\n   156\u2192      if (obj && event.state) {\n   157\u2192        const stateDef = obj.states[event.state];\n   158\u2192        if (stateDef?.auto_next?.after) {\n   159\u2192          holdMs = stateDef.auto_next.after * 1000;\n   160\u2192        }\n   161\u2192      }\n   162\u2192\n   163\u2192      // Face toward the object tile before entering interaction\n   164\u2192      if (obj) {\n   165\u2192        const dx = obj.tx - Math.round(char.tx);\n   166\u2192        const dy = obj.ty - Math.round(char.ty);\n   167\u2192        if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {\n   168\u2192          char.facing = dx >= 0 ? 'right' : 'left';\n   169\u2192        } else {\n   170\u2192          char.facing = dy >= 0 ? 'down' : 'up';\n   171\u2192        }\n   172\u2192      }\n   173\u2192\n   174\u2192      char.startInteraction(objectId, holdMs, obj?.interactAnim ?? null);\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192      if (event.speech) char.pendingSpeech = event.speech;\n   177\u2192      if (event.emoji)  this.pendingEvents.push(event);\n   178\u2192    } else {\n   179\u2192      // No valid transition (object changed state mid-walk) \u2014 release the\n   180\u2192      // reservation and try to find an alternative object.\n   181\u2192      this.objectEngine.release(objectId, char.name);\n   182\u2192      this._fallbackToAlternativeObject(char, objectId);\n   183\u2192    }\n   184\u2192  }\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Talk handshake \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192  /**\n   189\u2192   * Called when a character arrives at the tile adjacent to their talk target.\n   190\u2192   * Checks proximity and re-evaluates B's availability before starting conversation.\n   191\u2192   */\n   192\u2192  _handleTalkArrival(char) {\n   193\u2192    const target = char.pendingTalkTarget;\n   194\u2192    char.pendingTalkTarget = null;\n   195\u2192\n   196\u2192    // Proximity check: target may have moved significantly during the walk.\n   197\u2192    const dx   = Math.round(target.tx) - Math.round(char.tx);\n   198\u2192    const dy   = Math.round(target.ty) - Math.round(char.ty);\n   199\u2192    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192    if (dist > 3) {\n   202\u2192      // Target has drifted \u2014 try to follow if not too far\n   203\u2192      if (dist <= 10) {\n   204\u2192        const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);\n   205\u2192        const adjTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(Math.round(target.tx), Math.round(target.ty), dynWalkable);\n   206\u2192        if (adjTile && char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty, dynWalkable)) {\n   207\u2192          // Re-attach pending talk so we retry on next arrival\n   208\u2192          char.pendingTalkTarget   = target;\n   209\u2192          char._talkRetargetTimer  = 2000;\n   210\u2192          return;\n   211\u2192        }\n   212\u2192      }\n   213\u2192      // Too far or unreachable \u2014 abort\n   214\u2192      this.pendingEvents.push({\n   215\u2192        type:      'fallback',\n   216\u2192        charLabel: char.label,\n   217\u2192        reason:    'talk_target_moved',\n   218\u2192        fromLabel: target.label,\n   219\u2192        toLabel:   null,\n   220\u2192      });\n   221\u2192      char.pendingTalkDialogue = null;\n   222\u2192      char.pendingTalkResponse = null;\n   223\u2192      char.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;\n   224\u2192      return;\n   225\u2192    }\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192    // Re-check availability: accept if idle or walking, reject if busy\n   228\u2192    const canTalk = target.action === 'idle' || target.action === 'walking';\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192    if (!canTalk) {\n   231\u2192      this.pendingEvents.push({\n   232\u2192        type:           'talk_rejected',\n   233\u2192        initiatorLabel: char.label,\n   234\u2192        targetLabel:    target.label,\n   235\u2192      });\n   236\u2192      char.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;\n   237\u2192      return;\n   238\u2192    }\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192    this._startConversation(char, target);\n   241\u2192  }\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192  /**\n   244\u2192   * Configurable conversation duration range (ms).\n   245\u2192   * Defaults to 10\u201315 s; override via constructor config.\n   246\u2192   */\n   247\u2192  get _talkDurationMs() {\n   248\u2192    return 10_000 + Math.random() * 5_000;\n   249\u2192  }\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192  /**\n   252\u2192   * Synchronise charA and charB into a shared 'talking' state.\n   253\u2192   * Both face each other, AI timers are paused (via action check in AIEngine),\n   254\u2192   * and conversation ends naturally when the timer expires.\n   255\u2192   */\n   256\u2192  _startConversation(charA, charB) {\n   257\u2192    // Release any pending object reservation charB held while walking.\n   258\u2192    // startTalk() clears targetObjectId without calling objectEngine.release(),\n   259\u2192    // so we must do it here before the slot becomes permanently orphaned.\n   260\u2192    if (charB.targetObjectId) {\n   261\u2192      this.objectEngine.release(charB.targetObjectId, charB.name);\n   262\u2192      charB.targetObjectId = null;\n   263\u2192      charB.pendingAction  = null;\n   264\u2192    }\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192    const duration = this._talkDurationMs;\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192    // Face each other\n   269\u2192    const dx = Math.round(charB.tx) - Math.round(charA.tx);\n   270\u2192    const dy = Math.round(charB.ty) - Math.round(charA.ty);\n   271\u2192    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {\n   272\u2192      charA.facing = dx >= 0 ? 'right' : 'left';\n   273\u2192      charB.facing = dx >= 0 ? 'left'  : 'right';\n   274\u2192    } else {\n   275\u2192      charA.facing = dy >= 0 ? 'down' : 'up';\n   276\u2192      charB.facing = dy >= 0 ? 'up'   : 'down';\n   277\u2192    }\n   278\u2192\n   279\u2192    // Transfer queued dialogue to speech bubbles\n   280\u2192    if (charA.pendingTalkDialogue) {\n   281\u2192      charA.pendingSpeech          = charA.pendingTalkDialogue;\n   282\u2192      charA.pendingTalkDialogue    = null;\n   283\u2192    }\n   284\u2192    if (charA.pendingTalkResponse) {\n   285\u2192      charB.pendingSpeech          = charA.pendingTalkResponse;\n   286\u2192      charA.pendingTalkResponse    = null;\n   287\u2192    }\n   288\u2192\n   289\u2192    charA.startTalk(charB, duration);\n   290\u2192    charB.startTalk(charA, duration);\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192    this.pendingEvents.push({\n   293\u2192      type:           'conversation_start',\n   294\u2192      initiatorLabel: charA.label,\n   295\u2192      targetLabel:    charB.label,\n   296\u2192    });\n   297\u2192  }\n   298\u2192\n   299\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Wander \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   300\u2192\n   301\u2192  _doWander(char) {\n   302\u2192    // Build a walkable grid that treats other characters' tiles as obstacles\n   303\u2192    const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192    // 30% chance: walk to a random interactive object instead of wandering freely\n   306\u2192    if (Math.random() < 0.3) {\n   307\u2192      const objects = this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   308\u2192      if (objects.length > 0) {\n   309\u2192        // Shuffle and try each until one has an available slot and a reachable adjacent tile\n   310\u2192        const shuffled = objects.slice().sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);\n   311\u2192        for (const obj of shuffled) {\n   312\u2192          if (obj.isFull()) continue; // skip objects at capacity\n   313\u2192          // Only target objects whose current state accepts a 'use' interaction\n   314\u2192          const stateDef = obj.states[obj.state];\n   315\u2192          if (!stateDef?.transitions?.use) continue;\n   316\u2192          const tile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(obj.tx, obj.ty, dynWalkable);\n   317\u2192          if (tile && char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty, dynWalkable)) {\n   318\u2192            obj.reserve(char.name); // claim a slot before walking\n   319\u2192            char.targetObjectId = obj.id;\n   320\u2192            char.pendingAction  = 'use';\n   321\u2192            return;\n   322\u2192          }\n   323\u2192        }\n   324\u2192        // All objects full/non-interactable/unreachable \u2014 fall through to random wander\n   325\u2192      }\n   326\u2192    }\n   327\u2192\n   328\u2192    // Random walkable tile\n   329\u2192    const tiles = this._getWalkableTiles();\n   330\u2192    if (tiles.length === 0) {\n   331\u2192      char.wanderTimer = 2000;\n   332\u2192      return;\n   333\u2192    }\n   334\u2192\n   335\u2192    const cx = Math.round(char.tx);\n   336\u2192    const cy = Math.round(char.ty);\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192    let moved = false;\n   339\u2192    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 15; attempt++) {\n   340\u2192      const tile = tiles[Math.floor(Math.random() * tiles.length)];\n   341\u2192      if (tile.tx === cx && tile.ty === cy) continue;\n   342\u2192      moved = char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty, dynWalkable);\n   343\u2192      if (moved) break;\n   344\u2192    }\n   345\u2192\n   346\u2192    if (!moved) {\n   347\u2192      char._failedMoveCount++;\n   348\u2192      if (char._failedMoveCount >= 3) {\n   349\u2192        // Deadlock escape: step onto any free adjacent tile to break the standstill\n   350\u2192        char._failedMoveCount = 0;\n   351\u2192        const escapeTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(cx, cy, dynWalkable);\n   352\u2192        if (escapeTile) char.moveTo(escapeTile.tx, escapeTile.ty, dynWalkable);\n   353\u2192      }\n   354\u2192      // Retry quickly \u2014 the blocking character will likely have moved by then\n   355\u2192      char.wanderTimer = 500 + Math.random() * 500;\n   356\u2192    }\n   357\u2192  }\n   358\u2192\n   359\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Fallback helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192  /**\n   362\u2192   * Find the closest available object that `char` can interact with right now,\n   363\u2192   * excluding the object with `excludeId`.\n   364\u2192   * @returns {ObjectInstance|null}\n   365\u2192   */\n   366\u2192  _findAlternativeObject(char, excludeId) {\n   367\u2192    const objects = this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   368\u2192    let best     = null;\n   369\u2192    let bestDist = Infinity;\n   370\u2192\n   371\u2192    for (const obj of objects) {\n   372\u2192      if (obj.id === excludeId) continue;\n   373\u2192      if (obj.isFull()) continue;\n   374\u2192      // Require a usable state right now\n   375\u2192      const stateDef = obj.states[obj.state];\n   376\u2192      if (!stateDef?.transitions?.use) continue;\n   377\u2192      // Require a reachable adjacent tile\n   378\u2192      if (!this._findAdjacentWalkable(obj.tx, obj.ty)) continue;\n   379\u2192\n   380\u2192      const dx   = obj.tx - Math.round(char.tx);\n   381\u2192      const dy   = obj.ty - Math.round(char.ty);\n   382\u2192      const dist = dx * dx + dy * dy;\n   383\u2192      if (dist < bestDist) { bestDist = dist; best = obj; }\n   384\u2192    }\n   385\u2192\n   386\u2192    return best;\n   387\u2192  }\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192  /**\n   390\u2192   * Called when a character's object interaction fails on arrival.\n   391\u2192   * Tries to redirect to the nearest available alternative; emits a 'fallback' event.\n   392\u2192   */\n   393\u2192  _fallbackToAlternativeObject(char, fromId) {\n   394\u2192    const fromObj     = this.objectEngine.getById(fromId);\n   395\u2192    const alternative = this._findAlternativeObject(char, fromId);\n   396\u2192\n   397\u2192    if (alternative) {\n   398\u2192      const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);\n   399\u2192      const adjTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(alternative.tx, alternative.ty, dynWalkable);\n   400\u2192      if (adjTile && char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty, dynWalkable)) {\n   401\u2192        alternative.reserve(char.name);\n   402\u2192        char.targetObjectId = alternative.id;\n   403\u2192        char.pendingAction  = 'use';\n   404\u2192\n   405\u2192        this.pendingEvents.push({\n   406\u2192          type:      'fallback',\n   407\u2192          charLabel: char.label,\n   408\u2192          reason:    'object_unavailable',\n   409\u2192          fromLabel: fromObj?.name ?? fromId,\n   410\u2192          toLabel:   alternative.name,\n   411\u2192        });\n   412\u2192        return;\n   413\u2192      }\n   414\u2192    }\n   415\u2192\n   416\u2192    // No usable alternative \u2014 idle\n   417\u2192    char.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;\n   418\u2192    this.pendingEvents.push({\n   419\u2192      type:      'fallback',\n   420\u2192      charLabel: char.label,\n   421\u2192      reason:    'object_unavailable',\n   422\u2192      fromLabel: fromObj?.name ?? fromId,\n   423\u2192      toLabel:   null,\n   424\u2192    });\n   425\u2192  }\n   426\u2192\n   427\u2192  /**\n   428\u2192   * Called periodically while a character is walking toward a talk target.\n   429\u2192   * Re-routes the character if the target has moved, or aborts if too far.\n   430\u2192   */\n   431\u2192  _updateTalkRoute(char) {\n   432\u2192    const target = char.pendingTalkTarget;\n   433\u2192    if (!target) return;\n   434\u2192\n   435\u2192    const dx   = Math.round(target.tx) - Math.round(char.tx);\n   436\u2192    const dy   = Math.round(target.ty) - Math.round(char.ty);\n   437\u2192    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);\n   438\u2192\n   439\u2192    // If target has wandered more than 10 tiles away, give up\n   440\u2192    if (dist > 10) {\n   441\u2192      char.pendingTalkTarget   = null;\n   442\u2192      char.pendingTalkDialogue = null;\n   443\u2192      char.pendingTalkResponse = null;\n   444\u2192      char.path                = [];\n   445\u2192      char.action              = 'idle';\n   446\u2192      char.wanderTimer         = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;\n   447\u2192\n   448\u2192      this.pendingEvents.push({\n   449\u2192        type:      'fallback',\n   450\u2192        charLabel: char.label,\n   451\u2192        reason:    'talk_target_moved',\n   452\u2192        fromLabel: target.label,\n   453\u2192        toLabel:   null,\n   454\u2192      });\n   455\u2192      return;\n   456\u2192    }\n   457\u2192\n   458\u2192    // Re-route only if the path end has drifted more than 1 tile from target\n   459\u2192    const pathEnd = char.path[char.path.length - 1];\n   460\u2192    if (pathEnd) {\n   461\u2192      const edx = pathEnd.tx - Math.round(target.tx);\n   462\u2192      const edy = pathEnd.ty - Math.round(target.ty);\n   463\u2192      if (Math.sqrt(edx * edx + edy * edy) > 1) {\n   464\u2192        const dynWalkable = this._buildDynamicWalkable(char);\n   465\u2192        const adjTile = this._findAdjacentWalkable(Math.round(target.tx), Math.round(target.ty), dynWalkable);\n   466\u2192        if (adjTile) char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty, dynWalkable);\n   467\u2192      }\n   468\u2192    }\n   469\u2192  }\n   470\u2192\n   471\u2192  /**\n   472\u2192   * Return the first walkable tile cardinally adjacent to (tx, ty), or null.\n   473\u2192   * @param {boolean[][]} [walkable] - grid to check; defaults to the static this.walkable\n   474\u2192   */\n   475\u2192  _findAdjacentWalkable(tx, ty, walkable = this.walkable) {\n   476\u2192    const dirs = [\n   477\u2192      { tx, ty: ty - 1 },\n   478\u2192      { tx, ty: ty + 1 },\n   479\u2192      { tx: tx - 1, ty },\n   480\u2192      { tx: tx + 1, ty },\n   481\u2192    ];\n   482\u2192    for (const d of dirs) {\n   483\u2192      if (d.tx >= 0 && d.tx < this.gridCols && d.ty >= 0 && d.ty < this.gridRows) {\n   484\u2192        if (walkable[d.ty]?.[d.tx]) return d;\n   485\u2192      }\n   486\u2192    }\n   487\u2192    return null;\n   488\u2192  }\n   489\u2192\n   490\u2192  /**\n   491\u2192   * Clone the static walkable grid and mark every other character's current tile\n   492\u2192   * as blocked.  The calling character's own tile is left walkable.\n   493\u2192   * @param {object} excludeChar - the character doing the pathfinding (not blocked)\n   494\u2192   * @returns {boolean[][]}\n   495\u2192   */\n   496\u2192  _buildDynamicWalkable(excludeChar) {\n   497\u2192    const dynamic = this.walkable.map(row => row.slice());\n   498\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   499\u2192      if (char === excludeChar) continue;\n   500\u2192      const cx = Math.round(char.tx);\n   501\u2192      const cy = Math.round(char.ty);\n   502\u2192      if (cy >= 0 && cy < this.gridRows && cx >= 0 && cx < this.gridCols) {\n   503\u2192        dynamic[cy][cx] = false;\n   504\u2192      }\n   505\u2192    }\n   506\u2192    return dynamic;\n   507\u2192  }\n   508\u2192\n   509\u2192  _getWalkableTiles() {\n   510\u2192    if (this._walkableTiles) return this._walkableTiles;\n   511\u2192    const tiles = [];\n   512\u2192    for (let row = 0; row < this.gridRows; row++) {\n   513\u2192      for (let col = 0; col < this.gridCols; col++) {\n   514\u2192        if (this.walkable[row]?.[col]) tiles.push({ tx: col, ty: row });\n   515\u2192      }\n   516\u2192    }\n   517\u2192    this._walkableTiles = tiles;\n   518\u2192    return tiles;\n   519\u2192  }\n   520\u2192\n   521\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Sim clock \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   522\u2192\n   523\u2192  getSimTimeString() {\n   524\u2192    const totalSec = Math.floor(this.simTimeMs / 1000);\n   525\u2192    const hours    = Math.floor(totalSec / 3600) % 24;\n   526\u2192    const minutes  = Math.floor((totalSec % 3600) / 60);\n   527\u2192    const ampm     = hours >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\n   528\u2192    const h        = hours % 12 || 12;\n   529\u2192    return `${h}:${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')} ${ampm}`;\n   530\u2192  }\n   531\u2192}\n   532\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

USERMESSAGE #49
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→/**
     2→ * Character.js — tile-based character with A* pathfinding and state machine.
     3→ * Pure JS, no Phaser dependency. Sprite/label references are set externally.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→const TILE_SIZE = 48;
     7→
     8→// ─── A* pathfinding ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     9→
    10→function heuristic(ax, ay, bx, by) {
    11→  return Math.abs(ax - bx) + Math.abs(ay - by);
    12→}
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * Find a path from (startX, startY) to (goalX, goalY) on a walkable grid.
    16→ * @param {boolean[][]} walkable  - walkable[row][col]
    17→ * @param {number} cols
    18→ * @param {number} rows
    19→ * @returns {Array<{tx,ty}>|null}  - list of steps NOT including start; null if no path
    20→ */
    21→function findPath(walkable, cols, rows, startX, startY, goalX, goalY) {
    22→  if (startX === goalX && startY === goalY) return [];
    23→  if (!walkable[startY]?.[startX] || !walkable[goalY]?.[goalX]) return null;
    24→
    25→  const key = (x, y) => x * 1000 + y;
    26→
    27→  const open = new Map();
    28→  const closed = new Set();
    29→
    30→  const startNode = { x: startX, y: startY, g: 0, h: heuristic(startX, startY, goalX, goalY), parent: null };
    31→  open.set(key(startX, startY), startNode);
    32→
    33→  while (open.size > 0) {
    34→    // Pick node with lowest f = g + h
    35→    let current = null;
    36→    for (const node of open.values()) {
    37→      if (!current || node.g + node.h < current.g + current.h) current = node;
    38→    }
    39→
    40→    if (current.x === goalX && current.y === goalY) {
    41→      // Reconstruct path
    42→      const path = [];
    43→      let node = current;
    44→      while (node.parent) {
    45→        path.unshift({ tx: node.x, ty: node.y });
    46→        node = node.parent;
    47→      }
    48→      return path;
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    open.delete(key(current.x, current.y));
    52→    closed.add(key(current.x, current.y));
    53→
    54→    const neighbors = [
    55→      { x: current.x + 1, y: current.y },
    56→      { x: current.x - 1, y: current.y },
    57→      { x: current.x,     y: current.y + 1 },
    58→      { x: current.x,     y: current.y - 1 },
    59→    ];
    60→
    61→    for (const n of neighbors) {
    62→      if (n.x < 0 || n.x >= cols || n.y < 0 || n.y >= rows) continue;
    63→      if (!walkable[n.y]?.[n.x]) continue;
    64→      if (closed.has(key(n.x, n.y))) continue;
    65→
    66→      const g = current.g + 1;
    67→      const existing = open.get(key(n.x, n.y));
    68→      if (existing) {
    69→        if (g < existing.g) {
    70→          existing.g = g;
    71→          existing.parent = current;
    72→        }
    73→      } else {
    74→        open.set(key(n.x, n.y), {
    75→          x: n.x, y: n.y,
    76→          g, h: heuristic(n.x, n.y, goalX, goalY),
    77→          parent: current,
    78→        });
    79→      }
    80→    }
    81→  }
    82→
    83→  return null; // no path
    84→}
    85→
    86→// ─── Character ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    87→
    88→export class Character {
    89→  /**
    90→   * @param {object} config
    91→   * @param {string}   config.name        - sprite key prefix (e.g. 'Amelia')
    92→   * @param {string}   config.label       - display name (e.g. 'Maple')
    93→   * @param {number}   config.tx          - starting tile X
    94→   * @param {number}   config.ty          - starting tile Y
    95→   * @param {boolean[][]} config.walkable - walkable grid [row][col]
    96→   * @param {number}   config.gridCols
    97→   * @param {number}   config.gridRows
    98→   * @param {object}   [config.sprite]    - Phaser sprite (set after construction)
    99→   * @param {object}   [config.nameLabel] - Phaser Text object
   100→   * @param {number}   [config.moveSpeed] - tiles per second (default 2)
   101→   */
   102→  constructor(config) {
   103→    this.name      = config.name;
   104→    this.label     = config.label;
   105→    this.sprite    = config.sprite    || null;
   106→    this.nameLabel = config.nameLabel || null;
   107→
   108→    this.tx     = config.tx;
   109→    this.ty     = config.ty;
   110→    this.prevTx = config.tx;
   111→    this.prevTy = config.ty;
   112→
   113→    this.path        = [];
   114→    this.moveProgress = 0;
   115→    this.moveSpeed   = config.moveSpeed || 2; // tiles/sec
   116→
   117→    // State: 'idle' | 'walking' | 'interacting' | 'talking'
   118→    this.action = 'idle';
   119→    this.facing = 'down';
   120→
   121→    // Wander: timer counts DOWN; engine starts wander when <= 0
   122→    this.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000; // 3–8 s
   123→
   124→    // Interaction
   125→    this.interactTimer    = 0;
   126→    this.interactTimerMax = 0; // initial duration; used by UI for progress bar
   127→    this.interactTarget   = null;
   128→
   129→    // Personality stats (0–100)
   130→    this.mood   = 100;
   131→    this.energy = 100;
   132→
   133→    // Optional dialogue driven by AI
   134→    this.currentDialogue = null;
   135→    this.dialogueTimer   = 0;
   136→
   137→    // Preset dialogue lines (used for random speech bubbles)
   138→    this.dialogue     = config.dialogue || [];
   139→    // Counts down; when it hits 0 Engine sets pendingSpeech
   140→    this.speechTimer  = 20000 + Math.random() * 20000; // 20–40 s
   141→    // Scene reads this each frame and shows a bubble, then clears it
   142→    this.pendingSpeech = null;
   143→
   144→    this.walkable  = config.walkable;
   145→    this.gridCols  = config.gridCols;
   146→    this.gridRows  = config.gridRows;
   147→
   148→    // Object interaction targeting — set by engine, cleared on arrival
   149→    this.targetObjectId = null;
   150→    this.pendingAction  = null;
   151→
   152→    // Fallback/re-routing: counts down; engine updates talk route when <= 0
   153→    this._talkRetargetTimer = 0;
   154→
   155→    // Deadlock escape: counts consecutive failed wander attempts; resets on success
   156→    this._failedMoveCount = 0;
   157→
   158→    // Talk targeting — set by AIEngine when walking to meet another character
   159→    this.pendingTalkTarget   = null;  // Character ref awaiting arrival
   160→    this.pendingTalkDialogue = null;  // What A will say when conversation starts
   161→    this.pendingTalkResponse = null;  // What B will say when conversation starts
   162→
   163→    // Active conversation state
   164→    this.talkTimer    = 0;
   165→    this.talkTimerMax = 0;
   166→    this.talkTarget   = null;  // Character ref of current conversation partner
   167→  }
   168→
   169→  // ── Computed pixel position (Phaser setOrigin(0.5, 1) — feet at py) ─────────
   170→
   171→  get px() {
   172→    if (this.path.length === 0) {
   173→      return this.tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;
   174→    }
   175→    const next = this.path[0];
   176→    return (this.prevTx + (next.tx - this.prevTx) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  get py() {
   180→    if (this.path.length === 0) {
   181→      return (this.ty + 1) * TILE_SIZE;
   182→    }
   183→    const next = this.path[0];
   184→    return (this.prevTy + (next.ty - this.prevTy) * this.moveProgress + 1) * TILE_SIZE;
   185→  }
   186→
   187→  // ── Movement ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   188→
   189→  /**
   190→   * @param {number} goalTx
   191→   * @param {number} goalTy
   192→   * @param {boolean[][]} [walkable] - optional dynamic walkable grid; defaults to this.walkable
   193→   */
   194→  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy, walkable = this.walkable) {
   195→    const sx = Math.round(this.tx);
   196→    const sy = Math.round(this.ty);
   197→    const path = findPath(walkable, this.gridCols, this.gridRows, sx, sy, goalTx, goalTy);
   198→
   199→    if (path && path.length > 0) {
   200→      this.path         = path;
   201→      this.prevTx       = sx;
   202→      this.prevTy       = sy;
   203→      this.moveProgress = 0;
   204→      this.action       = 'walking';
   205→
   206→      // Reset deadlock counter on successful path
   207→      this._failedMoveCount = 0;
   208→
   209→      // Set initial facing from first step
   210→      this._updateFacingFromNextTile();
   211→      this._playWalkAnim();
   212→      return true;
   213→    }
   214→    return false;
   215→  }
   216→
   217→  /** Convenience wrapper — start interaction with a named object. */
   218→  startInteraction(objectId, durationMs, animType) {
   219→    this.startInteract(objectId, durationMs, animType);
   220→  }
   221→
   222→  startInteract(target, durationMs, animType) {
   223→    this.action           = 'interacting';
   224→    this.interactTarget   = target;
   225→    this.interactTimer    = durationMs;
   226→    this.interactTimerMax = durationMs;
   227→    if (this.sprite) {
   228→      const interactKey = animType ? `${this.name}_interact_${animType}` : null;
   229→      const key = (interactKey && this.sprite.anims.exists(interactKey))
   230→        ? interactKey
   231→        : `${this.name}_idle_anim`;
   232→      this.sprite.play(key, true);
   233→    }
   234→  }
   235→
   236→  /** Enter a shared talking state with `partner` for `durationMs` milliseconds. */
   237→  startTalk(partner, durationMs) {
   238→    // Stop any current movement
   239→    this.path        = [];
   240→    this.moveProgress = 0;
   241→
   242→    this.action       = 'talking';
   243→    this.talkTarget   = partner;
   244→    this.talkTimer    = durationMs;
   245→    this.talkTimerMax = durationMs;
   246→
   247→    // Clear any pending object interaction targeting
   248→    this.targetObjectId      = null;
   249→    this.pendingAction       = null;
   250→    // Clear any pending talk targeting (e.g. B was also walking to someone)
   251→    this.pendingTalkTarget   = null;
   252→    this.pendingTalkDialogue = null;
   253→    this.pendingTalkResponse = null;
   254→
   255→    if (this.sprite) {
   256→      this.sprite.play(`${this.name}_idle_anim`, true);
   257→    }
   258→  }
   259→
   260→  // ── Per-frame update ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   261→
   262→  update(deltaMs) {
   263→    if (this.action === 'walking' && this.path.length > 0) {
   264→      const tileDurationMs = 1000 / this.moveSpeed;
   265→      this.moveProgress += deltaMs / tileDurationMs;
   266→
   267→      // Advance tiles
   268→      while (this.moveProgress >= 1 && this.path.length > 0) {
   269→        this.moveProgress -= 1;
   270→        const arrived = this.path.shift();
   271→        this.prevTx = arrived.tx;
   272→        this.prevTy = arrived.ty;
   273→        this.tx     = arrived.tx;
   274→        this.ty     = arrived.ty;
   275→      }
   276→
   277→      // Update facing after tile advance so animation matches the current movement direction
   278→      this._updateFacingFromNextTile();
   279→
   280→      if (this.path.length === 0) {
   281→        this.moveProgress = 0;
   282→        this.action       = 'idle';
   283→        this.wanderTimer  = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;
   284→        this._playAnim('idle');
   285→      } else {
   286→        this._playWalkAnim();
   287→      }
   288→    } else if (this.action === 'idle') {
   289→      this.wanderTimer -= deltaMs;
   290→      // Ensure idle animation is always playing in idle state (handles external action resets)
   291→      this._playAnim('idle');
   292→    } else if (this.action === 'interacting') {
   293→      this.interactTimer -= deltaMs;
   294→      if (this.interactTimer <= 0) {
   295→        this.action        = 'idle';
   296→        this.interactTarget = null;
   297→        this.wanderTimer   = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;
   298→        this._playAnim('idle');
   299→      }
   300→    } else if (this.action === 'talking') {
   301→      this.talkTimer -= deltaMs;
   302→      if (this.talkTimer <= 0) {
   303→        this.action      = 'idle';
   304→        this.talkTarget  = null;
   305→        this.wanderTimer = 3000 + Math.random() * 5000;
   306→        this._playAnim('idle');
   307→      }
   308→    }
   309→
   310→    // Tick dialogue
   311→    if (this.dialogueTimer > 0) {
   312→      this.dialogueTimer -= deltaMs;
   313→      if (this.dialogueTimer <= 0) this.currentDialogue = null;
   314→    }
   315→
   316→    // Sync Phaser sprite
   317→    if (this.sprite) {
   318→      this.sprite.x = this.px;
   319→      this.sprite.y = this.py;
   320→    }
   321→
   322→    if (this.nameLabel && this.sprite) {
   323→      this.nameLabel.setPosition(this.sprite.x, this.sprite.y - 100);
   324→    }
   325→  }
   326→
   327→  // ── Perception ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   328→
   329→  /** Returns objects within `radius` tiles. */
   330→  getPerceivedObjects(objects, radius = 4) {
   331→    return objects.filter(obj => {
   332→      const dx = obj.tx - this.tx;
   333→      const dy = obj.ty - this.ty;
   334→      return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) <= radius;
   335→    });
   336→  }
   337→
   338→  // ── Animation helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   339→
   340→  _updateFacingFromNextTile() {
   341→    if (this.path.length === 0) return;
   342→    const next = this.path[0];
   343→    const dx   = next.tx - this.tx;
   344→    const dy   = next.ty - this.ty;
   345→    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {
   346→      this.facing = dx >= 0 ? 'right' : 'left';
   347→    } else {
   348→      this.facing = dy > 0 ? 'down' : 'up';
   349→    }
   350→  }
   351→
   352→  _playAnim(type) {
   353→    if (!this.sprite) return;
   354→    const key = type === 'idle'
   355→      ? `${this.name}_idle_anim`
   356→      : `${this.name}_walk_${this.facing}`;
   357→    if (this.sprite.anims.currentAnim?.key !== key) {
   358→      this.sprite.play(key, true);
   359→    }
   360→    this.sprite.flipX = (type === 'walk' && this.facing === 'left');
   361→  }
   362→
   363→  _playWalkAnim() {
   364→    this._playAnim('walk');
   365→  }
   366→}
   367→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
